## The agentic modernization tool for enterprise legacy systems

Claude Code combines AI code generation with deep codebase understanding and enterprise-grade security to transform how organizations approach code modernization.

### Agentic transformation

Claude Code performs dependency mapping and helps with incremental refactoring strategies while keeping humans in the loop.  

### Made for enterprise

Integrate with existing CI/CD pipelines, version control systems, and development workflows while ensuring enterprise-grade security and compliance.  

### Proven methodologies

Accelerate time-to-value with proven approaches to modernization, refactoring, and mitigating technical debt.

## Using Claude Code for code modernization

Claude Code transforms every stage of your modernization journey, and our ecosystem partners help provide comprehensive solutions to further accelerate time-to-value. Here's how teams are using Claude Code to eliminate technical debt faster.

### Legacy system analysis

Generate dependency graphs, identify dead code, and prioritize refactoring based on code complexity metrics and business impact.

### Systematic transformation

Transform legacy codebases systematically while maintaining business continuity. Claude Code preserves critical business logic while modernizing to current frameworks.

### Automated testing and validation

Claude Code can seamlessly create unit tests for refactored code, identify missing test coverage, and help write regression tests.

### Security and compliance updates

Identify and patch vulnerabilities while maintaining regulatory compliance patterns embedded in legacy systems.

### Documentation generation

Create modern documentation from undocumented legacy code, capturing institutional knowledge before it's lost.
